case_title: TAPIA LIDIA VS WILL MARK DENNIS

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAPIA LIDIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILL MARK DENNIS $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $108.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY TAPIA LIDIA AS TO DEFENDANT WILL MARK DENNIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
